title: verbascum × incanum
intro: Verbascum × incanum, also known as the Mullein, is a hybrid perennial plant that belongs to the figwort family, native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal remedies, due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × incanum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and allergies, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. Mullein is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and its leaves and flowers can be dried and used in infusions for their medicinal benefits.
